visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a bright Costco warehouse setting. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret, silver earrings, and a dark blue off-the-shoulder top, stands in front of a glass-door freezer filled with pink boxes. She smiles broadly at the camera, gesturing with her hands while a large red and blue Costco logo is superimposed at the top. (2) The scene transitions to a medium shot as she holds up a large white and red box labeled 'Prawn Hargow'. Behind her, a person in a green cap is seen reaching into the freezer. The woman continues to speak enthusiastically, her facial expressions animated. (3) The camera cuts to a close-up of a stainless steel steamer basket where several translucent, crescent-shaped dumplings (hargow) are being steamed. A hand uses metal tongs to pick up one of the dumplings, showing its glistening, semi-transparent skin. (4) The setting shifts to an indoor kitchen or dining area. Two women are seated at a table. The woman from the previous scene and another woman with long dark hair in a purple top. They are shown eating the dumplings, dipping them into a small dish of soy sauce. (5) Multiple close-up shots are interspersed showing the internal filling of the dumplings, revealing chunks of pink shrimp and yellow bamboo shoots. Animated yellow circular text overlays appear around the woman's head as she chews and gestures to emphasize the 'bouncy' texture of the food.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 連路人也瘋狂? [Slogan]: 一顆11元. [Variety]: 冷凍蝦餃. [Subtitle]: 蝦餃蝦餃. (2) [Subtitle]: 一個11塊. [Subtitle]: 這是新的喔 感覺很.. [Subtitle]: 感覺應該很好. (3) [Subtitle]: 對! 沒錯. [Subtitle]: 那我們買回去試試看. [Subtitle]: 謝謝熱心民眾. [Subtitle]: 聽說很好吃. [Variety]: 每個QQ彈彈. (4) [Subtitle]: 水滾之後蒸15分鐘. [Variety]: 非常晶瑩剔透. (5) [Subtitle]: 一顆11.4塊的蝦餃. [Variety]: 買來試試看. [Subtitle]: 我建議大家 買來試試看. [Subtitle]: 它是 我吃過表皮最Q. [Subtitle]: 然後內餡香味 非常的單純. [Subtitle]: 你可以吃得到 完整的蝦肉. [Subtitle]: 以及竹筍的蝦餃. [Variety]: 香油的香味. [Subtitle]: 還有 一點淡淡的那種 香油的香味. [Subtitle]: 很不錯 它沒有加什麼豬肉 來讓它整個肉味提出. [Subtitle]: 但本身就很有味道. [Subtitle]: 而且他的皮 真的太Q了 這個Q度 真的是.. [Variety]: 彈彈彈彈彈. (6) [Subtitle]: 它不是那種 皮薄餡多 但是它是肉多皮也多. [Subtitle]: 然後那個皮 嚼起來就像那個 那個水晶餃 咕嘟咕嘟 站在你的牙齒裡 這樣. [Variety]: 彈彈彈彈彈. (7) [Subtitle]: 你喜歡咀嚼 喜歡吃珍珠的人 不要錯過. [Subtitle]: 好好吃.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 female companion at table, 1 male passerby in background at the warehouse.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a dark blue off-the-shoulder ruffled top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial scene is inside a Costco warehouse store, characterized by tall industrial shelving, glass-fronted freezers, and bright fluorescent lighting. The second half of the video takes place in a home dining area with a neutral-toned wall and a dining table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female vocals begin immediately with a cheerful, fast-paced delivery. Upbeat electronic BGM with a steady 4/4 beat starts simultaneously. A digital 'ding' SFX occurs as the Costco logo appears. (2) A 'whoosh' SFX triggers a transition as the narrator's pitch rises slightly while discussing the price. The BGM remains consistent in tempo. (3) A percussive 'pop' SFX marks the switch to the steamer scene. The vocals continue without a pause, maintaining high arousal. (4) As the women taste the food, a 'spring' or 'boing' cartoon SFX is heard to emphasize the chewy texture. The BGM volume ducks slightly to prioritize the clear, crisp articulation of the narrator's review. (5) Multiple short 'impact' SFX coincide with the quick cuts of the shrimp filling. The narrator's tone is highly positive and assertive throughout the conclusion.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional food review for a specific frozen prawn hargow product sold at Costco. It aims to showcase the product's affordability, ease of preparation (steaming), and high quality (specifically its 'bouncy' texture and whole shrimp filling) to encourage viewers to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video prominently features the Costco logo, shows the specific product packaging multiple times, and the narrator provides a highly positive, direct recommendation to buy it.
endorsementObject: Chen's Dim Sum At Home Prawn Hargow

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes fast-paced editing, bright visuals, and cheerful narration typical of social media product endorsements.
